creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 230709
Screenshot: comp.unix.bsd.freebsd.announce

> FreeBSD’s community is diverse and extensive, 


Additions
=========

Let's not omit the FreeBSD community in Reddit. Please add: 

<https://www.reddit.com/r/freebsd/>


NNTP
====

Over the past year, only around twenty discussions have been posted to comp.unix.bsd.freebsd.announce (screenshot attached). NNTP is alive, but archaic. 


Sidebar
=======

I reckon, the Community page sidebar can lose the 'Newsgroups' link. If people really want NNTP (usenet), they can find what's required in the Handbook. 

Instead, the sidebar might be a good place for the link to /r/freebsd


Thanks
